name: Do We Really Need Transformers for Global Spatial Information Extraction in Traffic Forecasting?

description: arXiv:2607.12462v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Existing traffic forecasting models commonly focus on extracting spatial dependencies, particularly global spatial information, which characterizes the representations obtained through interactions between each individual node and all nodes across the traffic network. However, the underlying mechanism by which such global information is modeled an...
author: Qihang Zhang, Siyao Zhang, Letao Kang, Wenzhe Liang, Miao Zhang, Zhao Zhang
